summary: Completed testing of TYRELL flower shop UI changes and backend features. All 9 requested features are working correctly: Hero beige gold color, removed decorative text, header stays pink/burgundy on scroll with white logo, real WhatsApp SVG icon, Services grid layout, lightbox functionality, and image upload optimization with thumbnails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Hero highlight text uses beige gold #D4B896 (rgb(212,184,150)), 2) No '---FLOWER STUDIO' decorative text on right side - only left label remains, 3) Header has bg-tyrell-burgundy/95 on scroll with white logo (blanco.png), 4) WhatsApp button uses real WhatsApp SVG icon (path starts with M17.472), 5) Services section uses grid layout with 2x2 image display and +N overlay, 6) Lightbox opens on image click with navigation arrows and counter, 7) Backend image upload creates optimized JPG and thumbnail

hero_beige_gold_color.details: Highlighted text 'aman lo extraordinario' uses #D4B896 color, computed as rgb(212, 184, 150)

hero_no_decorative_text_right.details: Only 1 occurrence of 'Flower Studio' in hero (left-aligned label only), no right-positioned absolute elements

header_pink_burgundy_on_scroll.details: Header gets class 'bg-tyrell-burgundy/95 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-[0_2px_30px_rgba(183,110,121,0.2)]' when scrolled

header_white_logo_on_scroll.details: Logo uses white version: TYRELL_2025_corporativo_blanco.png - stays white regardless of scroll state

whatsapp_real_svg_icon.details: WhatsApp button has SVG with path starting 'M17.472' (real WhatsApp icon, not MessageCircle from lucide)

services_grid_layout.details: Services section uses grid layout (grid-cols-2, grid-rows-2) displaying up to 4 images with +N overlay for more

services_lightbox.details: Clicking images opens lightbox dialog with navigation arrows (prev/next), counter (1/10), close button, and large image display

image_upload_optimization.details: Backend /api/upload creates optimized JPG and thumbnail. Response includes: url, thumbnail, filename
